english translation text: Al MADAD MAWLA RAZAHelp us O Imam Reza (a.s)!English Transliteration

Your paternal grandfather is Imam Ali (a.s.),
Your grandmother is Hazrat Fatima (s.a)

You are the Messiah of the world and the King of the Khorasan is your title,
No Du’a is rejected at your door step,

urdu transliteration text:
BINAAI BHI DETA HAI TU GOYAAI BHI DETA HAI TU MAANGE AGAR TUJSE KOI DAANAAI BHI DETA HAI TU TU BHI TO BABE ILM HAI TU BHI TO HAI MUSHKIL KUSHAA,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You give eyesight and the ability to speak,
You even bestow wisdom on people who ask for it,
You are also the door of knowledge and the solver of problems

urdu transliteration text:
HAI ZAAMINE AAHU BHI TU GUL BHI HAI TU KHUSHBU BHI TU HAI PONCHTA HAR AANKH SE GIRTE HUWE AANSU BHI TU TERI ATAAYE DEKH KAR DUSHMAN KO BHI KEHNAA PARAA,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
You are Zamin e Aahu (the one who took guarantee for the deer),
You wipe the tears from the eyes of the Azadar,
After seeing your generosity even your enemy had to say,

urdu transliteration text:
TERI KARAAMAATE NAZAR SHAB HO KE HO WAQTE SAHAR KEHTA HAI HAR ZAAIR TERA ROZE KI JAALI CHUM KAR MASHHAD MUQADDAS HO GAYA TUNE JO AAKAR DI AZAAN,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When you look with kindness then even the night can turn into dawn,
This is what every pilgrim says while kissing your shrine,
Mashhad became holy as a result of your presence

urdu transliteration text:
TERE HI DASTAR-KHAAN PAR HOTA HAI JANNAT KA GHUMAAN JINNO MALLAK LETE HAI SAB TERE HI DAR SE ROTIYAA MAULA TERA MAKRUUZ HAI HAR IK GADAAO BAADSHAA,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
One imagines as if one is in heaven when sitting at your Dastar Khwan (food served in the shrine),
The angels and Jinns received their sustenance at your step,
Every king and beggar owes a debt to you

urdu transliteration text:
ROZE SE TERE DUUR HAI HAM TO BOHOT MAJBOOR HAI AANKHON SE AANSU HAI RAWAAN DIL BHI GHAMON SE CHUR HAI TUJSE KAHENGE HALE DIL IZNE ZIYARAT KAR ATAA,
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
We are far from your shrine and very helpless,
Tears are flowing from our eyes and our hearts are broken,
We will share what is in our hearts with you
